scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const p of ['node_modules/react-native-reanimated','node_modules/react-native-worklets','apps/mobile/node_modules/react-native-reanimated','apps/mobile/node_modules/react-native-worklets']) { try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch {} }"
